seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response.
new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "value your contributions."
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response. Avoid using the phrase "value your contributions."
response:
Subject: Vacation Request Approved - [Employee Name]

Hi [Employee Name],

This email confirms the approval of your vacation request for the dates of [Start Date] through [End Date].

Please ensure all your critical tasks are completed or properly handed off to [Colleague's Name/Team] before you leave. Let's make sure we're set up for a smooth absence.

We deeply appreciate the hard work and dedication you bring to the team every day.

Enjoy your time off!

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
